name_cn:
Genuine quality
FF Old Flower
Peekaboo X-Tote handbag embroidery tote! With internal pockets and iconic turnlock. Features two short handles for hand carrying and two long handles for shoulder carrying. Houndstooth canvas material. Coordinating embossed FF decorative pattern. Top-grain cowhide trim. Gold metal hardware. Size 40*12*29cm Style No.: Shopping bag Old Flower
